The '''New Republic Scout Service''' was a [[scout]] [[Squadron|unit]] within the [[New Republic]]. [[Finch Dallow]] logged many [[pilot]] [[Standard hour|hours]] with New Republic Scout Service before he joined the [[Resistance]].<ref name="Incredibuilds" />

{{Nr-stub}}
